personal_info.name: Mahadev Biniraj
personal_info.title: Flutter Geliştirici
personal_info.bio: Flutter Developer with strong knowledge of Dart and the Flutter framework. Skilled in building responsive mobile applications, integrating REST APIs, and managing state using Provider. Familiar with using Generative AI tools to improve development efficiency, debugging, and problem-solving. Quick learner with a passion for clean UI and continuous improvement. I am also passionate about coding and sports.
personal_info.tagline: Passionate Flutter Developer building clean and responsive mobile experiences.

experiences.title: Flutter Developer
experiences.description: Built responsive Flutter applications using Dart and Material widgets, integrated REST APIs with JSON handling, implemented basic Provider state management, and worked with Firebase Authentication and Firestore.

experiences.title: Technical Consultant (ERP – Odoo)
experiences.description: Assisted in ERP implementation and customization using Odoo while collaborating with team members to understand and streamline business workflows.

projects.title: E-commerce App
projects.description: Developed an e-commerce mobile application using Flutter and Fake Store REST APIs, implementing product listing, cart management, and user authentication, with state management handled using Provider and login persistence using Shared Preferences.

case_study.problem: Developing a scalable e-commerce solution with real-time API data and local state management.
case_study.solution: Used Flutter for the UI, Provider for state management, and integrated Fake Store API for product data.
case_study.result: A fully functional e-commerce app with cart and authentication features.

projects.title: Daily News App
projects.description: Built a Flutter news app using REST API with Provider state management, category/country filters.

case_study.problem: Providing users with real-time news updates filtered by categories and regions.
case_study.solution: Integrated a News REST API and implemented dynamic filtering using Provider.
case_study.result: A responsive news application with personalized content filtering.

projects.title: Social Media App
projects.description: Developed an Instagram-style social media application using Flutter, implementing feed UI, likes, profile screens, and state management with Provider, along with mock login using SharedPreferences.

case_study.problem: Creating a complex social media UI with interactive elements and persistent login.
case_study.solution: Built custom widgets for feed and profiles, used Provider for state, and SharedPreferences for session management.
case_study.result: A smooth Instagram-like experience with functional feed and profile management.

projects.title: Fitness Social Media App
projects.description: Developed a Flutter based fitness social media application.

case_study.problem: Connecting fitness enthusiasts through a dedicated mobile platform.
case_study.solution: Designed a community-focused UI for sharing fitness progress and routines.
case_study.result: An engaging social platform tailored for the fitness community.

projects.title: Quiz App
projects.description: Designed and implemented a Flutter Quiz App with multiple choice questions, button-based options, score calculation logic, result screen with remarks, and app restart feature.

case_study.problem: Building an interactive quiz experience with real-time scoring and feedback.
case_study.solution: Implemented complex logic for question handling and score calculation with a clean result UI.
case_study.result: An intuitive quiz app that provides instant feedback and allows users to restart easily.

projects.title: Note App
projects.description: Developed a Flutter Note Application with login, registration, and home screens, enabling users to create, edit, and delete notes, with local data persistence using the Hive database.

case_study.problem: Creating a reliable note-taking app with offline support and user accounts.
case_study.solution: Used Hive for high-performance local storage and implemented a secure authentication flow.
case_study.result: A robust note application allowing users to manage their thoughts securely even offline.

education.school: St. Thomas College of Engineering And Technology
